title: Command Jumbo Canvas Hanger Hook, Pack of 1 Hook and 4 Adhesive Strips, White - Damage Free Hanging for Canvas Framed Pictures, Prints and Art - Holds up to 2 kg
features: DAMAGE-FREE DECORATING: Say goodbye to holes and sticky residue on your walls; Command Picture Hangers are easy to use and help you decorate your walls without leaving any marks; Decorate, organise and celebrate damage free with Command

NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Command Wall Hangers are self adhesive and easy to apply; They hang sawtooth, D ring, wire-backed and keyhole hanging frames, mirrors and canvas art damage free, without the use of nails or tools

EASY CLEAN REMOVAL: Command Picture Hangers, a damage-free hanging solution can be removed without leaving any residue; Lightly hold the top of the removable adhesive strip and slowly pull straight down towards the floor to remove decor and prevent damage of walls and surfaces
STRONG AND VERSATILE: 1 hook can hold one frame weighing up to 2kg, and measuring up to 60cm by 90cm
RECOMMENDED SURFACES: Command adhesive strips hold strongly on a variety of indoor surfaces including painted walls, finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, glass, metal and tiles

PACKAGING: Packaging for this item is made with FSC Mix certified fibre with minimum of 90% recycled content; All glues and varnishes used to produce the packaging are solvent-free; The packaging is 100% recyclable in existing household waste streams
Warnings: Do not hang over beds; Do not use on wallpapers, delicate or weak surfaces; Do not hang valuable items; Failure to follow instructions may result in damage or injury
Indoor use only; Recommended for use on painted walls, finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, glass, metal and tiles; Hang picture frames, wall art and small mirrors
